title: lepigonum radicans
intro: Lepigonum radicans, also known as the climbing fern or Boston fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Lepigonum radicans include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing stress, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Lepigonum radicans can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in skincare products due to its soothing and moisturizing effects.
